svg.text: Categorizes major technical challenges and their maturity (solved → hard)

g.text: Solved: Retrieval / Vector DBs (Pinecone, Chroma, Milvus)
Partially solved: Eval & Benchmarking (OpenAI Evals, Promptfoo)
Hard: Reproducibility & Debugging Non-determinism (Anthropic case study)
Hard: Security & Governance (enterprise compliance, data residency)
